## What should improve?

Describe the method, template, or example that could be clearer.

## Use case

```text
Who is the human maintainer?
What is the agent trying to do?
What permission level is needed?
```

## Suggested change

```text
Proposed wording or structure:
```

## Readback requirement

What should the agent report back after using this method?

## Boundary

Does this suggestion require higher permission, public release action, or any system outside the repository?
